From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

(Redirected from [Hon (disambiguation)](/w/index.php?title=Hon_(disambiguation)&redirect=no "Hon (disambiguation)"))

[![logo](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/9/99/Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg/40px-Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg.png)](/wiki/File:Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg)

Look up ***[Hon](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/Hon "wiktionary:Hon")***, ***[hon](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/hon "wiktionary:hon")***, or ***[hón](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/h%C3%B3n "wiktionary:hón")*** in Wiktionary, the free dictionary.

**Hon** or **HON** may refer to:

## People

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Hon&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: People")]

### Given name

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Hon&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Given name")]

* [Cho Hŏn](/wiki/Cho_H%C5%8Fn "Cho Hŏn") (1544–1592), Joseon militia leader
* [Ho Hon](/wiki/Ho_Hon "Ho Hon") (1885–1951), North Korean politician

### Surname

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Hon&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Surname")]

* [Han (surname)](/wiki/Han_(Chinese_surname) "Han (Chinese surname)") (Chinese: 韩/韓), also romanized Hon
* [Louis Hon](/wiki/Louis_Hon "Louis Hon") (1924–2008), French footballer
* [Priscilla Hon](/wiki/Priscilla_Hon "Priscilla Hon") (born 1998), Australian tennis player

## Other uses

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Hon&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Other uses")]

* [Hon (Baltimore)](/wiki/Hon_(Baltimore) "Hon (Baltimore)"), a cultural stereotype of working-class women from Baltimore, Maryland, United States
* [Cafe Hon](/wiki/Cafe_Hon "Cafe Hon"), a restaurant in Baltimore
* [Hon, Arkansas](/wiki/Hon,_Arkansas "Hon, Arkansas"), a community in the United States
* [Hands on Network](/wiki/Hands_on_Network "Hands on Network"), an American network of volunteer centers
* [Health On the Net Foundation](/wiki/Health_On_the_Net_Foundation "Health On the Net Foundation"), a Swiss non-governmental organization
* *[Heroes of Newerth](/wiki/Heroes_of_Newerth "Heroes of Newerth")*, a 2010 video game
* [Høn Station](/wiki/H%C3%B8n_Station "Høn Station"), in Asker, Norway
* [The HON Company](/wiki/The_HON_Company "The HON Company"), an American business furniture manufacturer
* [Honduras at the Olympics](/wiki/Honduras_at_the_Olympics "Honduras at the Olympics")
* [Honeywell](/wiki/Honeywell "Honeywell") (NYSE stock symbol: HON), an American multinational corporation
* [Honorary (disambiguation)](/wiki/Honorary_(disambiguation) "Honorary (disambiguation)")
* [The Honourable](/wiki/The_Honourable "The Honourable"), an honorific styling
* [Huron Regional Airport](/wiki/Huron_Regional_Airport "Huron Regional Airport"), in South Dakota, United States
* [On (biblical figure)](/wiki/On_(biblical_figure) "On (biblical figure)") (or Hon), a minor biblical figure
* Hon, a [term of endearment](/wiki/Term_of_endearment "Term of endearment"), short for "honey"
